threshold_event_class: Amsterdam exact buyer-side tender/award/contract or row-specific public assessment companion becomes publicly inspectable
current_ceiling_now: Amsterdam is the richest exact-row register exemplar, but buyer-side procurement and publicly inspectable companion-document support remain unresolved on tested public routes.
what_changes_if_threshold_lands: The shard-006 package could then say that one seeded municipal register row closes the current exact-companion blocker, so Amsterdam would move from register-rich caution row toward exact buyer-side or public-assessment support and the five-row panel would no longer be limited to disclosure-surface heterogeneity alone.
what_stays_bounded_even_after_patch: One Amsterdam breakthrough would still not justify procurement completeness claims, denominator-ready prevalence claims, or generalized municipal transparency rankings.
paper_thesis_use: Lane-local patch board for the first threshold-changing sf09 event, keeping row-state, dimension-gap, mechanism-cell, and rebuttal layers synchronized.
dashboard_hook: Amsterdam blocker badge can upgrade across Table 1B sidecars, dimension heatmap, and mechanism panel without silent drift.

threshold_event_class: Helsinki page-specific contract, tender lot, award attachment, DPIA, or impact-assessment companion becomes publicly inspectable and explicitly tied to the parking-chatbot row
current_ceiling_now: Helsinki is currently the strongest buyer-side middle state because a same-buyer supplier-consistent award package is public, but linkage remains family-level rather than exact row-specific proof.
what_changes_if_threshold_lands: The shard-006 package could then state that Helsinki no longer stops at family-level continuity and instead has one page-specific buyer-side or assessment companion, strengthening the exactness-versus-traceability contrast with a positive procurement-side closure.
what_stays_bounded_even_after_patch: A Helsinki breakthrough would still not justify national register coverage claims, generalized procurement transparency claims, or removal of Amsterdam-specific caution if Amsterdam remains unresolved.
paper_thesis_use: Lane-local patch board for the only event that legitimately unfreezes Helsinki from middle-state comparator status.
dashboard_hook: Helsinki linkage badge can upgrade to exact-row attachment support across ladder, dimension, and overread-risk views.

threshold_event_class: Serco or Chelmer gains a public buyer-side procurement, supplier, DPIA, or assessment companion from official sources
current_ceiling_now: The UK comparator rows already provide direct regulator-text governance depth, but they remain buyer-side thin and should not be reused as procurement or supplier proof.
what_changes_if_threshold_lands: The UK pair could then move from governance-only comparators toward mixed governance-plus-companion states, strengthening one comparison dimension inside Table 1B without reopening the municipal exactness route order.
what_stays_bounded_even_after_patch: Comparator hardening would still not solve the main sf09 exact municipal companion blocker or justify collapsing regulator-document and register rows into one class.
paper_thesis_use: Maintenance-only patch map for comparator-row hardening.
dashboard_hook: Comparator badges can change without rewriting the Amsterdam/Helsinki route-order story.

threshold_event_class: ORION gains an official procurement, register, technical, or assessment companion
current_ceiling_now: ORION currently functions as the official project-page low-trace floor and should not be reused as procurement-backed deployment or operational-effectiveness evidence.
what_changes_if_threshold_lands: The ORION row could move above pure floor status and add geography-side diversity, but it would still remain secondary to the Amsterdam/Helsinki municipal exact-companion route for manuscript payoff.
what_stays_bounded_even_after_patch: One ORION companion would not justify legality, effectiveness, procurement completeness, or cross-jurisdiction transparency claims.
paper_thesis_use: Low-trace-floor patch map for future multilingual/public-sector reuse.
dashboard_hook: Floor badge and route-priority overlay can update together if ORION stops being project-page-only.
